steps.title: Set up the equations
steps.content:
Translate each statement into an equation.
94% of h equals 47% of j: $$0.94h = 0.47j$$
j is 30% of k: $$j = 0.30k$$

steps.title: Solve for h in terms of k
steps.content:
Since 0.94 = 2 × 0.47, divide both sides of the first equation by 0.47:
$$2h = j$$
Substitute j = 0.30k:
$$2h = 0.30k$$
$$h = 0.15k$$

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: h = 0.15k means h is 15% of k. 15 is correct.
